title: Silver Tree Oil/Wax Warmer
description: Product description Our gorgeous Desire Wax & Oil Warmer is perfect for use with Wax Melts or Fragrance Oil. Just use a standard size tealight underneath to fill your home with a gorgeous aroma whilst adding a lovely piece of home decor. - Mix and match your favourite scents - For use with most Wax Melts - Not suitable for fragrance oils Directions Use a standard size tealight candle underneath. Place a wax melt on top. Light the tealight to fill your home with aroma. Safety Warning Do not use with essential oils. Always use with wax melts or fragrance-free oils. Keep out of reach of children and pets. Use in a well-ventilated area. See more
